purpose: This document formally links the two parallel tracks of MetaBlooms development — the GW governed workflow (Claude Bundle artifact processing) and the OS kernel (SIR25 build line) — into a single unified handoff. From this point forward, both tracks share the same baseline ZIP and the same memory sync file.

6 Nomotic policy merge rules — deferred pending policy merge pass

contents_summary.registry: 204 artifacts in artifact_registry.json (5 new ARB sidecar entries — BUILD-6)

memory_sync.session_note: BUILD-1→6 complete: stage runner, interrupt checker, pulse logger, sidecar generator, memory sync, registry patch — 204 artifacts, all MERGE-S9 follow-ons closed
memory_sync.usage: Hand this file to Claude at the start of the next session. Claude reads it and starts pre-oriented — no re-reading the full bundle.

what_was_not_possible_before_this_sessio: Stages required manual sub-commands — now transactional_stage_runner_v1.py runs P-1→P7 autonomously
Failures propagated silently through chunks — now IC-1→IC-6 catch them per-artifact
No execution-time governance — now runtime pulse logger runs 8 checks per artifact
Failure patterns required Robert to notice and request bundles — now auto-generated at threshold
Every ChatGPT session cold-started — now CLAUDE_MEMORY_SYNC_v1.json eliminates re-orientation
ARB sidecar namespace was invisible to the registry — now 5 entries registered and auditable
OS had 12 scripts — now has 17, covering the full P-1→P7 + IC + pulse + sidecar + memory lifecycle
